Flash Fire.name: Flash Fire
Flash Fire.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

Overgrow.name: Overgrow
Overgrow.description: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

Blaze.name: Blaze
Blaze.description: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

Torrent.name: Torrent
Torrent.description: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

Swarm.name: Swarm
Swarm.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

Tangled Feet.name: Tangled Feet
Tangled Feet.description: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

Motor Drive.name: Motor Drive
Motor Drive.description: Raises Speed if hit by an Electric-type move.

Rivalry.name: Rivalry
Rivalry.description: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.

Steadfast.name: Steadfast
Steadfast.description: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.

Gluttony.name: Gluttony
Gluttony.description: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

Anger Point.name: Anger Point
Anger Point.description: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.

Unburden.name: Unburden
Unburden.description: Raises Speed if a held item is used.

Heatproof.name: Heatproof
Heatproof.description: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.

Simple.name: Simple
Simple.description: The Pokémon is prone to wild stat changes.

Dry Skin.name: Dry Skin
Dry Skin.description: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.

Download.name: Download
Download.description: Adjusts power according to the foe’s ability.

Iron Fist.name: Iron Fist
Iron Fist.description: Boosts the power of punching moves.

Poison Heal.name: Poison Heal
Poison Heal.description: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

Adaptability.name: Adaptability
Adaptability.description: Powers up moves of the same type.

Skill Link.name: Skill Link
Skill Link.description: Increases the frequency of multi-strike moves.

Hydration.name: Hydration
Hydration.description: Heals status problems if it is raining.

Solar Power.name: Solar Power
Solar Power.description: Boosts Sp. Atk, but lowers HP in sunshine.

Quick Feet.name: Quick Feet
Quick Feet.description: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.

Normalize.name: Normalize
Normalize.description: All the Pokémon’s moves become the Normal type.

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.description: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

Magic Guard.name: Magic Guard
Magic Guard.description: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

No Guard.name: No Guard
No Guard.description: Ensures the Pokémon and its foe’s attacks land.

Stall.name: Stall
Stall.description: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.

Technician.name: Technician
Technician.description: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

Leaf Guard.name: Leaf Guard
Leaf Guard.description: Prevents status problems in sunny weather.

Klutz.name: Klutz
Klutz.description: The Pokémon can’t use any held items.

Mold Breaker.name: Mold Breaker
Mold Breaker.description: Moves can be used regardless of abilities.

Super Luck.name: Super Luck
Super Luck.description: Heightens the critical-hit ratios of moves.

Aftermath.name: Aftermath
Aftermath.description: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.

Forewarn.name: Forewarn
Forewarn.description: Determines what moves the foe has.

Unaware.name: Unaware
Unaware.description: Ignores any change in ability by the foe.

Scrappy.name: Scrappy
Scrappy.description: Enables moves to hit Ghost-type foes.

Storm Drain.name: Storm Drain
Storm Drain.description: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves.

Ice Body.name: Ice Body
Ice Body.description: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.

Snow Warning.name: Snow Warning
Snow Warning.description: The Pokémon summons a hailstorm in battle.

Honey Gather.name: Honey Gather
Honey Gather.description: The Pokémon may gather Honey from somewhere.

Frisk.name: Frisk
Frisk.description: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.

Reckless.name: Reckless
Reckless.description: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

Multitype.name: Multitype
Multitype.description: Changes type to match the held Plate.

Flower Gift.name: Flower Gift
Flower Gift.description: Powers up party Pokémon when it is sunny.

Pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
Pickpocket.description: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.

Sheer Force.name: Sheer Force
Sheer Force.description: Removes added effects to increase move damage.

Contrary.name: Contrary
Contrary.description: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

Unnerve.name: Unnerve
Unnerve.description: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.

Defiant.name: Defiant
Defiant.description: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.

Defeatist.name: Defeatist
Defeatist.description: Lowers stats when HP becomes half or less.

Cursed Body.name: Cursed Body
Cursed Body.description: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

Healer.name: Healer
Healer.description: May heal an ally’s status conditions.

Weak Armor.name: Weak Armor
Weak Armor.description: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.

Multiscale.name: Multiscale
Multiscale.description: Reduces damage when HP is full.

Toxic Boost.name: Toxic Boost
Toxic Boost.description: Powers up physical attacks when poisoned.

Flare Boost.name: Flare Boost
Flare Boost.description: Powers up special attacks when burned.

Harvest.name: Harvest
Harvest.description: May create another Berry after one is used.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.description: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

Moody.name: Moody
Moody.description: Raises one stat and lowers another.

Overcoat.name: Overcoat
Overcoat.description: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.

Poison Touch.name: Poison Touch
Poison Touch.description: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.

Regenerator.name: Regenerator
Regenerator.description: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

Big Pecks.name: Big Pecks
Big Pecks.description: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

Sand Rush.name: Sand Rush
Sand Rush.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in a sandstorm.

Wonder Skin.name: Wonder Skin
Wonder Skin.description: Makes status-changing moves more likely to miss.

Analytic.name: Analytic
Analytic.description: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.

Illusion.name: Illusion
Illusion.description: Comes out disguised as the Pokémon in back.

Imposter.name: Imposter
Imposter.description: It transforms itself into the Pokémon it is facing.

Infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
Infiltrator.description: Passes through the foe’s barrier and strikes.

Mummy.name: Mummy
Mummy.description: Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.

Moxie.name: Moxie
Moxie.description: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.

Justified.name: Justified
Justified.description: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

Rattled.name: Rattled
Rattled.description: Some move types scare it and boost its Speed.

Sap Sipper.name: Sap Sipper
Sap Sipper.description: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.

Prankster.name: Prankster
Prankster.description: Gives priority to a status move.

Sand Force.name: Sand Force
Sand Force.description: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

Iron Barbs.name: Iron Barbs
Iron Barbs.description: Inflicts damage to the Pokémon on contact.

Zen Mode.name: Zen Mode
Zen Mode.description: Changes the Pokémon’s shape when HP is halved.

Victory Star.name: Victory Star
Victory Star.description: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.

Turboblaze.name: Turboblaze
Turboblaze.description: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.

Teravolt.name: Teravolt
Teravolt.description: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.

Aroma Veil.name: Aroma Veil
Aroma Veil.description: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

Flower Veil.name: Flower Veil
Flower Veil.description: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.

Cheek Pouch.name: Cheek Pouch
Cheek Pouch.description: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

Protean.name: Protean
Protean.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

Magician.name: Magician
Magician.description: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

Bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
Bulletproof.description: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

Competitive.name: Competitive
Competitive.description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

Strong Jaw.name: Strong Jaw
Strong Jaw.description: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

Sweet Veil.name: Sweet Veil
Sweet Veil.description: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

Stance Change.name: Stance Change
Stance Change.description: The Pokémon changes form depending on how it battles.

Mega Launcher.name: Mega Launcher
Mega Launcher.description: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

Grass Pelt.name: Grass Pelt
Grass Pelt.description: Boosts the Defense stat in Grassy Terrain.

Symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
Symbiosis.description: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.

Tough Claws.name: Tough Claws
Tough Claws.description: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

Gooey.name: Gooey
Gooey.description: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

Dark Aura.name: Dark Aura
Dark Aura.description: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.

Fairy Aura.name: Fairy Aura
Fairy Aura.description: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

Aura Break.name: Aura Break
Aura Break.description: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed.

Primordial Sea.name: Primordial Sea
Primordial Sea.description: Affects weather and nullifies any Fire-type attacks.

Desolate Land.name: Desolate Land
Desolate Land.description: Affects weather and nullifies any Water-type attacks.

Delta Stream.name: Delta Stream
Delta Stream.description: Affects weather and eliminates all of the Flying type’s weaknesses.

Stamina.name: Stamina
Stamina.description: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

Wimp Out.name: Wimp Out
Wimp Out.description: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

Emergency Exit.name: Emergency Exit
Emergency Exit.description: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

Water Compaction.name: Water Compaction
Water Compaction.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat sharply when hit by a Water-type move.

Merciless.name: Merciless
Merciless.description: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

Shields Down.name: Shields Down
Shields Down.description: When its HP becomes half or less, the Pokémon’s shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

Stakeout.name: Stakeout
Stakeout.description: Doubles the damage dealt to the target’s replacement if the target switches out.

Water Bubble.name: Water Bubble
Water Bubble.description: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.

Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

Slush Rush.name: Slush Rush
Slush Rush.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.

Long Reach.name: Long Reach
Long Reach.description: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

Liquid Voice.name: Liquid Voice
Liquid Voice.description: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

Triage.name: Triage
Triage.description: Gives priority to a healing move.

Galvanize.name: Galvanize
Galvanize.description: Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Surge Surfer.name: Surge Surfer
Surge Surfer.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

Schooling.name: Schooling
Schooling.description: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

Disguise.name: Disguise
Disguise.description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.

Battle Bond.name: Battle Bond
Battle Bond.description: Defeating an opposing Pokémon strengthens the Pokémon’s bond with its Trainer, and it becomes Ash-Greninja. Water Shuriken gets more powerful.

Power Construct.name: Power Construct
Power Construct.description: Other Cells gather to aid when its HP becomes half or less. Then the Pokémon changes its form to Complete Forme.

Corrosion.name: Corrosion
Corrosion.description: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.

Comatose.name: Comatose
Comatose.description: It’s always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack without waking up.

Queenly Majesty.name: Queenly Majesty
Queenly Majesty.description: Its majesty pressures the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

Innards Out.name: Innards Out
Innards Out.description: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

Dancer.name: Dancer
Dancer.description: When another Pokémon uses a dance move, it can use a dance move following it regardless of its Speed.

Battery.name: Battery
Battery.description: Powers up ally Pokémon’s special moves.

Fluffy.name: Fluffy
Fluffy.description: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

Dazzling.name: Dazzling
Dazzling.description: Surprises the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

Soul Heart.name: Soul Heart
Soul Heart.description: Boosts its Sp. Atk stat every time a Pokémon faints.

Tangling Hair.name: Tangling Hair
Tangling Hair.description: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

Receiver.name: Receiver
Receiver.description: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Power Of Alchemy.name: Power Of Alchemy
Power Of Alchemy.description: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Beast Boost.name: Beast Boost
Beast Boost.description: The Pokémon boosts its most proficient stat each time it knocks out a Pokémon.

Rks System.name: Rks System
Rks System.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.

Electric Surge.name: Electric Surge
Electric Surge.description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Psychic Surge.name: Psychic Surge
Psychic Surge.description: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Misty Surge.name: Misty Surge
Misty Surge.description: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Grassy Surge.name: Grassy Surge
Grassy Surge.description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Full Metal Body.name: Full Metal Body
Full Metal Body.description: Prevents other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon’s stats.

Shadow Shield.name: Shadow Shield
Shadow Shield.description: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

Prism Armor.name: Prism Armor
Prism Armor.description: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks taken.

Neuroforce.name: Neuroforce
Neuroforce.description: Powers up moves that are super effective.

Intrepid Sword.name: Intrepid Sword
Intrepid Sword.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Dauntless Shield.name: Dauntless Shield
Dauntless Shield.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Libero.name: Libero
Libero.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

Ball Fetch.name: Ball Fetch
Ball Fetch.description: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

Cotton Down.name: Cotton Down
Cotton Down.description: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stat of all Pokémon except itself.

Propeller Tail.name: Propeller Tail
Propeller Tail.description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Mirror Armor.name: Mirror Armor
Mirror Armor.description: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

Gulp Missile.name: Gulp Missile
Gulp Missile.description: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

Stalwart.name: Stalwart
Stalwart.description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Steam Engine.name: Steam Engine
Steam Engine.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat drastically if hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

Punk Rock.name: Punk Rock
Punk Rock.description: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

Sand Spit.name: Sand Spit
Sand Spit.description: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

Ice Scales.name: Ice Scales
Ice Scales.description: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

Ripen.name: Ripen
Ripen.description: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

Ice Face.name: Ice Face
Ice Face.description: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it hails.

Power Spot.name: Power Spot
Power Spot.description: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

Screen Cleaner.name: Screen Cleaner
Screen Cleaner.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

Steely Spirit.name: Steely Spirit
Steely Spirit.description: Powers up ally Pokémon’s Steel-type moves.

Perish Body.name: Perish Body
Perish Body.description: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

Wandering Spirit.name: Wandering Spirit
Wandering Spirit.description: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

Gorilla Tactics.name: Gorilla Tactics
Gorilla Tactics.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

Neutralizing Gas.name: Neutralizing Gas
Neutralizing Gas.description: If the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas is in the battle, the effects of all Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

Pastel Veil.name: Pastel Veil
Pastel Veil.description: Protects the Pokémon and its ally Pokémon from being poisoned.

Hunger Switch.name: Hunger Switch
Hunger Switch.description: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

Unseen Fist.name: Unseen Fist
Unseen Fist.description: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

Curious Medicine.name: Curious Medicine
Curious Medicine.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

Chilling Neigh.name: Chilling Neigh
Chilling Neigh.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

Grim Neigh.name: Grim Neigh
Grim Neigh.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

As One Glastrier.name: As One Glastrier
As One Glastrier.description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Glastrier’s Chilling Neigh Ability.

As One Spectrier.name: As One Spectrier
As One Spectrier.description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Spectrier’s Grim Neigh Ability.

Lingering Aroma.name: Lingering Aroma
Lingering Aroma.description: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

Seed Sower.name: Seed Sower
Seed Sower.description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

Thermal Exchange.name: Thermal Exchange
Thermal Exchange.description: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

Anger Shell.name: Anger Shell
Anger Shell.description: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

Purifying Salt.name: Purifying Salt
Purifying Salt.description: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

Well Baked Body.name: Well Baked Body
Well Baked Body.description: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

Wind Rider.name: Wind Rider
Wind Rider.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

Guard Dog.name: Guard Dog
Guard Dog.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

Wind Power.name: Wind Power
Wind Power.description: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

Zero To Hero.name: Zero To Hero
Zero To Hero.description: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

Commander.name: Commander
Commander.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.

Electromorphosis.name: Electromorphosis
Electromorphosis.description: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

Protosynthesis.name: Protosynthesis
Protosynthesis.description: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

Quark Drive.name: Quark Drive
Quark Drive.description: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

Good As Gold.name: Good As Gold
Good As Gold.description: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

Vessel Of Ruin.name: Vessel Of Ruin
Vessel Of Ruin.description: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

Sword Of Ruin.name: Sword Of Ruin
Sword Of Ruin.description: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

Tablets Of Ruin.name: Tablets Of Ruin
Tablets Of Ruin.description: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

Beads Of Ruin.name: Beads Of Ruin
Beads Of Ruin.description: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

Orichalcum Pulse.name: Orichalcum Pulse
Orichalcum Pulse.description: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

Hadron Engine.name: Hadron Engine
Hadron Engine.description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

Opportunist.name: Opportunist
Opportunist.description: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

Cud Chew.name: Cud Chew
Cud Chew.description: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

Supreme Overlord.name: Supreme Overlord
Supreme Overlord.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

Costar.name: Costar
Costar.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

Toxic Debris.name: Toxic Debris
Toxic Debris.description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

Armor Tail.name: Armor Tail
Armor Tail.description: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

Earth Eater.name: Earth Eater
Earth Eater.description: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Mycelium Might.name: Mycelium Might
Mycelium Might.description: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

Minds Eye.name: Minds Eye
Minds Eye.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal-type and Fighting-type moves

Supersweet Syrup.name: Supersweet Syrup
Supersweet Syrup.description: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

Hospitality.name: Hospitality
Hospitality.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

Toxic Chain.name: Toxic Chain
Toxic Chain.description: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

Embody Aspect.name: Embody Aspect
Embody Aspect.description: The Pokémon's heart fills with memories, causing the Mask to shine and one of the Pokémon's stats to be boosted.

Tera Shift.name: Tera Shift
Tera Shift.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

Tera Shell.name: Tera Shell
Tera Shell.description: The Pokémon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

Teraform Zero.name: Teraform Zero
Teraform Zero.description: When Terapagos changes into its Stellar Form, it uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

Poison Puppeteer.name: Poison Puppeteer
Poison Puppeteer.description: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.

Piercing Drill.name: Piercing Drill
Piercing Drill.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

Dragonize.name: Dragonize
Dragonize.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Mega Sol.name: Mega Sol
Mega Sol.description: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

Spicy Spray.name: Spicy Spray
Spicy Spray.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

Eelevate.name: Eelevate
Eelevate.description: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Fire Mane.name: Fire Mane
Fire Mane.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Fire-type moves by 50%.
